title: Introduction to Astronomy
catalogDescription: Presents a unified account of contemporary astronomy beginning with our earth and moving outward toward our solar system, and beyond to the stars of our home galaxy and out into the physical universe. Laboratory portion introduces students to methods and techniques commonly employed in astronomy. Actual experiments vary depending upon weather conditions and observable celestial objects. Not open to students who have taken ASTR& 100.
prerequisiteNotes: Official Green River enrollment requirement text: Eligible for ENGL& 101 or instructor consent.
requirement text is preserved as a note until a parser can safely normalize AND/OR/instructor-consent semantics into graph prerequisites.
